routing_rules: Prefer one primary skill per scenario.
Add optional skills only when the primary output indicates a gap.
Escalate to orchestrate-governance-loop when multiple scenarios are active in one cycle.
Use artifact handoff (requirements/design/alignment/doc-readiness reports) rather than implicit context passing.

scenarios.title: Project Start
scenarios.when_to_use: New project, new initiative, or major direction reset
scenarios.output: Validated requirements and initial design/doc structure
scenarios.stop_condition: Requirements approved and design path selected

scenarios.title: Post-Task Governance
scenarios.when_to_use: A task is done and you need to validate direction
scenarios.output: Execution Alignment Report with drift and calibration actions
scenarios.stop_condition: Next 1-3 tasks reprioritized with confidence level

scenarios.title: Documentation Gap Triage
scenarios.when_to_use: Alignment confidence is low due to weak/missing docs
scenarios.output: Documentation Readiness Report and Minimal Fill Plan
scenarios.stop_condition: Critical layers reach at least weak and high-priority gaps have owners

scenarios.title: Iteration Orchestration
scenarios.when_to_use: Milestone closure, release gate, or periodic governance cycle
scenarios.output: Cycle report with executed/skipped steps and Recommended Next Tasks
scenarios.stop_condition: All required scenario checks are completed or explicitly deferred

scenarios.title: Code Quality Review
scenarios.when_to_use: Review quality/security/performance/testing before merge or release

scenarios.title: Delivery Convergence
scenarios.when_to_use: Need to run tests, fix failures, and stabilize before commit
scenarios.stop_condition: Tests pass and commit scope is clear

scenarios.title: Repository Onboarding
scenarios.when_to_use: New team member, inherited repository, or handoff
scenarios.stop_condition: New contributor can navigate and start work without ad-hoc guidance

scenarios.title: Skill System Governance
scenarios.when_to_use: Audit/refactor skill inventory and maintain quality
scenarios.stop_condition: Registry and quality signals are up to date

scenarios.title: Quick Capture (Work Items)
scenarios.when_to_use: User wants to record a requirement, bug, or issue without deep validation
scenarios.optional_note: when item is vague and needs validation
scenarios.output: Structured work item(s) in docs/backlog/ or project convention

scenarios.title: Repository Maintenance
scenarios.when_to_use: Cleanup, optimization, or archiving of old content
scenarios.output: Cleaned repository structure and archived obsolete content
